title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Ahmedabad - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Ahmedabad - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIM Ahmedabad, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Ahmedabad:
IIM Ahmedabad is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Ahmedabad!
